The '''Battle of Mantessa''' was fought during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==The battle==
A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] force, including [[Fire Breather]]s, tried to invade the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mantessa]] but was defeated by the [[Orange Panthacs]]—a platoon of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]].

==Aftermath==
Later, the Orange Panthacs received a special commendation from [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] for their defense of the planet.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' {{1stm}}
